case_title: BREINING, CHRISTOPHER P. VS FOX, HILARY A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BREINING, CHRISTOPHER P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY A. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $777.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY FOX, HILARY A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BREINING, CHRISTOPHER P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FOX, HILARY A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BREINING, CHRISTOPHER P. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,394.25 FILED BY BREINING, CHRISTOPHER P. AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, HILARY A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
REQUEAST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF. SEND PAPER TO JUDGE.
DEFT'S HUSBAND FILING DEFT'S OPPOSITION TO PLTFF'S REQUEST"TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT".ALSO FILED GEOFFREY HANSEN'S DECLARATION.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS DENIED. COPIES OF DENIAL SENT TO PARTIES.
